text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":true,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"The draft references the user’s three attempts, two-week delay, and blocked funds, avoids firm promises, and says KYC ops will review, without inventing rules; however, it speculates about possible causes, omits the within-X-hours commitment, and doesn’t ask about glare/four corners, though it remains concise."}
